title: Day 8 Lesson 3 ( Video )Asking and giving a personal impression
html:
Day 8 - Lesson 3

かんそう を きく、かんそう を いう (kansoo o kiku, kansoo o iu)  = Asking and giving a personal impression

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ (kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): にほんじん の がくせい, あんなさん りゅう がくせい (nihonjin no gaksee, Anna-san ryuugaksee) = Japanese student, Anna-san study abroad student

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
